exercises.name: Chords
exercises.userMessage: Hear the chord and choose your answer

children.name: Minor and major chords
children.description: Practice distinguishing minor and major triads by ear.

children.name: Diminished and Augmented Chords
children.description: Practice distinguishing diminished and augmented triads by ear.

children.name: Triads
children.description: Practice recognizing the basic triad qualities in root position.

children.name: Major - inversions
children.description: Practice recognizing major triads in different inversions.

children.name: Minor - inversions
children.description: Practice recognizing minor triads in different inversions.

children.name: Diminished - inversions
children.description: Practice recognizing diminished triads in different inversions.

children.name: Triads - inversions
children.description: Practice recognizing triads across root position and inversions.

children.name: Suspended chords
children.description: Practice distinguishing suspended chord sounds from major and minor harmony.

children.name: All three note chords
children.description: Practice recognizing all three-note chord types by ear.
